items: Roll Call
If you have public comment related to a Closed Session item, please post it on the links under Public Content prior to the Closed Session Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
CONFERENCE WITH LEGAL COUNSEL— ANTICIPATED LITIGATION (Significant exposure to litigation pursuant to Paragraph (2) of subdivision (d) of Section 54956.9). One case: confidential pupil matter.
CSEA Negotiations Update
RCTA Negotiations Update
Roll Call
Report Out on Closed Session from February 26, 2025
Welcome by the School Board President, Mike Wells
Additions, Deletions, or Modifications to the Agenda
Approval of Agenda

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Update on the Facilities Master Plan
Annual Update to the Local Control Accountability Plan (LCAP)
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 3515.5: Sex Offender Notification
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 6170.1 Transitional Kindergarten
Approval of Consent Items
Approval of the February 5 Board Meeting Minutes
Approval of Addendum to the 2024-25 Measure U Application for Roy Cloud School
Approval of Addendum to the 2024-25 Measure U Application for Orion Alternative and Mandarin Immersion School
Approval of Addendum to the 2024-25 Measure U Application for North Star Academy (NSA)
Approval of Personnel Report
Approval of Comprehensive School Safety Plans (Public) 2024-2025
Ratification of Warrant Registers, January 1, 2025 - January 31, 2025
Submission of 2025 CSBA Delegate Assembly Nominations
Adoption of Resolution No. 16, Release and Reassignment of Certificated Administrator(s)
Adoption of Resolution No. 17, Reduction or Elimination of Certificated Services for Fiscal Year 2024-2025
Adoption of Resolution No. 18, Reduction of Certain Classified Services for Fiscal Year 2024-2025
Adoption of Resolution No. 19, Resolution to Approve Standards for Local Certification of Universal Transitional Kindergarten Teachers
Adoption of Resolution No. 20, Approval of Education Code and Title V Options for Teaching Assignments 2024-2025 School Year
Approval of Release of Temporary Teachers
Approval of Declaration of Need for the 2025-2026 School Year
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Contract Update Information and Credit Card Summary
Information on San Mateo County Investment Fund - December 2024
Information on San Mateo County Investment Fund - January 2025
Correspondence
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Meetings Calendar
Adjourn the Meeting

llmResponse.agenda_changes: No changes to the posted agenda were announced at the start of the meeting. The meeting proceeded with items in the order listed on the posted agenda after the closed session.
